titleStmt.title: SII 26.164: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 164. (A.R. No. 156 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records the endorsement of the king to the gift of land, made by Jayaṁgoṇḍaśōḻi alias Ulaguḍaiya-mukkōkkiḻāṉaḍigaḷ, the daughter of Vīrachōḻadēva who ruled the two Koṅgus as one. The land appears to have been situated in a place Irājarāja •••• in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu. The gift is stated to have been entrusted to one Kaṇṇabhaṭṭaṉ, a servant in the temple of Vīrachōḷīśvaramuḍaiyār, and it was for doing certain services to the deity Nittaniṉṟāḍuvār (i.e., Nat6arāja).
The record is signed by Uttaramantiri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṉerimeṉkoṇṭāṉ Āḷuṭaiyār viracoḷicciramuṭaiyār tevar kaṉmi kaṇṇapaṭṭaṉukku namolai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Āḷuṭaiyār nitta niṉṟāṭuvār tiruccāntu cāttit tirukkāppuṉālc cāttiyaruḷukaikku Iraṇṭu koṅku moṉṟākavāṇṭa viracoḻatevar makaḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻiyāṉa Ulakuṭaiya mukkokkiḻāṉaṭikaḷ karaivaḻināṭṭu rāṉa Irācarāca koṇṭuṭaiya nilamālampirāṉ maṉṉaṟaiyi nellirukalane tūṇippatakku Itaṟkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellaiyāvatu coḻakāmiṇṭa nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟ
kellai koyil nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Aḻakiyacoḻakkāmiṇṭa ṉilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kilaiceṭṭi nilattukku teṟku minnāṉkellaikku muṭpaṭṭa nilamirukalaṉe tūṇippatakku nel vitaiyāl vanta nelluk koṇṭu ta
vatākavulakuṭaiya mukkokkiḻāṉaṭikaḷ kuṭuttamaikku nam Olai kuṭuttom yippaṭikkivai Uttaramantiri
patimuṉṟukkup viḷakkum Amaiccakuṭivirakeraḷavaḷanāṭṭu naṉnaṉūr vāṇiyaril tevakaṇṭanāṉa ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamāyileṭṭikaḷ Ivaṉta pimārāyaṉum coḻamāyilaṭṭiyum nakaramāyilaṭṭiyum naṉte Eḻuvaṉ coḻaṉ Ivaṉ nampimārāyaṉum tevaṉ maṇ nāna coḻamāyileṭṭiyum coḻamāyileṭṭiyum tevaṉ
pattukkum Aiṅ ṇṇay ppārākavum Eṇṇa Oḷakkum pattumātam toṟuṅ koyilile toṭarntu ceppunāḻiyāle Aḷantu Ikkoyiṟ tevakaṉmi kaiyyāle kaiccaāttu koṇṭu Ittevar tirunā kkaḻañcu poṉṉukku nel Aḷappārākavum Ivakaḷ makkaḷ makkaḷukkiṟai puravu ciṟṟāyamelavai Okavai poṟpūccamaintu maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭatum koṇṭu nā kuḷḷutaraṉ
Digital edition of SII 26.164 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
